schema_output.narrative_text: ʿUmar looks through an old scroll, remembering the Prophet's promise to Surāqah. He recalls the words, 'You will be rewarded.'
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A quiet, dimly lit 7th century study room or library in Makkah, with simple wooden shelves and a few clay storage jars against the walls, and a packed-earth floor covered by a woven palm-fiber mat. Soft morning light streams through a narrow window high up on the wall, casting a warm glow across the room. In the center of the room, a tall man sits on a low wooden stool, seen entirely from behind: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a deep brown woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades, one hand extended in a gentle gesture as he holds an old parchment, an old leather-bound scroll or manuscript lying open on his lap. The man's head is turned away, but his body language conveys a thoughtful, reflective mood. Soft warm golden light, intimate and contemplative mood. Medium close shot at eye level. Warm beige, cream, and golden palette with the deep brown cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
_safety_changes: 'face is not visible' -> 'head is turned away'
